new_classes.label_en: Concentrated Grape Must other than for direct consumption as beverage (CN 2204 30 96)
new_classes.label_de: Konzentrierter Traubenmost, nicht für den unmittelbaren Verbrauch als Getränk (KN 2204 30 96)
new_classes.definition_en: Concentrated grape must falling within heading 2204, subheading 2204 30 96, which is not intended for direct consumption as a beverage and is subject to additional note 7 to Chapter 22. Distinguished from CN 2204 30 92 (concentrated grape must for direct consumption) by the absence of the ready-for-consumption quality.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2204 30 96 identifies two key distinguishing criteria: (1) the grape must is concentrated (captured via someValuesFrom ConcentratedQuality), and (2) the product is governed by additional note 7 to Chapter 22. The note 7 criterion is administrative/definitional in nature and cannot be directly represented as a product-discriminating OWL restriction without knowing the full content of additional note 7. The sibling CN 2204 30 92 (ConcentratedGrapeMust in the TBox) covers concentrated grape must for direct consumption; CN 2204 30 96 covers the remainder (not for direct consumption as beverage), captured via complement restriction on ReadyForConsumptionQuality. The complement restriction on ConcentratedGrapeMust (sibling class) avoids overlap. Coverage is reduced because the content of additional note 7 is not provided in the legal text snippet, so any further sub-criteria it introduces cannot be axiomatised here.
